xwikidoc.name: ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClassSheet
xwikidoc.creator: XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content: {{velocity}} #macro (renderMaybeLink $page $anchor $url $content) #if ($url == "-" || $url == "?") #set ($url = "") #end #if ("$!page" != "") [[## #elseif ("$!url" != "" && $url.startsWith("http")) {{html clean=false}}{{/html}}## #end## $content## #if ("$!page" != "") >>$page## #if ("$!anchor" != "") ||anchor="$anchor"## #end## ]]## #elseif ("$!url" != "" && $url.startsWith("http")) {{html clean=false}}{{/html}}## #end## #end #set ($className = 'DocApp.Code.ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClass') #set ($macroObj = $doc.getObject($className)) #set ($confluenceId = $macroObj.confluenceId) #if ("$!confluenceId" != "") #set($res = $services.query.xwql("select doc.fullName from Document doc, doc.object(DocApp.Code.ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClass) obj where obj.confluenceId = :confluenceId").bindValue('confluenceId', $confluenceId).execute()) #if ($res.size() > 1) {{warning}} It seems that this macro is also documented elsewhere: #foreach ($i in $res) #if ($i != $doc.fullName) * [[$services.rendering.escape($services.rendering.escape($i, 'xwiki/2.1'), 'xwiki/2.1')>>$i]] #end #end {{/warning}} #end #end #if ($macroObj != $NULL) #set($class = $macroObj.xWikiClass) #if ($xcontext.action == "edit") #foreach($property in $class.properties) ; $property.prettyName : $doc.display($property.getName()) #end #else #set ($importSupportQualifier = $macroObj.get('importSupportQualifier')) #if ($importSupportQualifier == 'partial') {{warning}} The import of this macro may be incomplete or lack features. {{/warning}} #elseif ($importSupportQualifier == 'no') {{error}} The import of this macro is not supported: important features will be missing. {{/error}} #end Confluence macro ## #set ($confluenceURL = $macroObj.getValue("confluenceURL")) #renderMaybeLink("" "" $confluenceURL, "{{code language='none'}}$confluenceId{{/code}}") #set ($handling = $macroObj.getValue('handling')) #set ($xwikiId = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiId')) #set ($xwikiURL = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiURL')) #set ($xwikiPage = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiPage')) #set ($xwikiPageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiPageAnchor')) #if ($handling == "conversion") #if ("$!xwikiId" == "") #set ($xwikiIdContent = "some syntax") ## #else #set ($xwikiIdContent = "macro {{code language='none'}}$xwikiId{{/code}}") ## #end is converted to ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, $xwikiIdContent) ## #elseif ($handling == "bridge") is covered by the ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, "{{code language}}$xwikiId{{/code}} bridge macro")## #elseif ($handling == "direct") is imported ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, "as-is")## #else uses ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, $handling) conversion ## #end## #set ($requiredForUsage = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsage')) #if ($requiredForUsage == "XWiki Standard") which a standard installation of XWiki provides## #elseif ("$!requiredForUsage" != "" && !$requiredForUsage.startsWith('http')) which requires $requiredForUsage## #else #set ($requiredForUsageId = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsageId')) #set ($requiredForUsageContent = $requiredForUsageId) #if ("$!requiredForUsageContent" == "") #set ($requiredForUsageContent = "this") #end which requires ## #set ($requiredForUsagePage = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsagePage')) #set ($requiredForUsagePageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsagePageAnchor')) #renderMaybeLink($requiredForUsagePage, $requiredForUsagePageAnchor, $requiredForUsage, "package {{code language='none'}}$requiredForUsageId{{/code}}")## #end. #set ($requiredForImport = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImport')) #set ($requiredForImportPage = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportPage')) #set ($requiredForImportPageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportPageAnchor')) #set ($requiredForImportId = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportId')) #if ("$!requiredForImportId" == "") #if ("$!requiredForImport" != "") Importing this macro requires $requiredForImport. ## #end #elseif ($requiredForImportId == "org.xwiki.contrib.confluence:confluence-xml" || $requiredForImportId == "com.xwiki.confluence:confluence-migration-package-ui") Importing this macro doesn't requires anything specific apart from the standard migration tools. ## #else Importing this macro requires ## #renderMaybeLink($requiredForImportPage, $requiredForImportPageAnchor, $requiredForImport, "package {{code language='none'}}$requiredForImportId{{/code}}"). ## #end #set ($equivXWikiFeatureURL = $macroObj.getValue("equivXWikiFeatureURL")) #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue("equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor")) #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor" != '') #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor = $equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor + '||anchor="anchor"')' #end #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePage = $macroObj.getValue("equivXWikiFeaturePage")) #set ($correspondingXWikiFeature = $macroObj.getValue("correspondingXWikiFeature")) #if ("$!equivXWikiFeatureURL" != "" || "$!correspondingXWikiFeature" != "") == What to use in XWiki $!correspondingXWikiFeature #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePage" != "") #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor" == "") See [[$equivXWikiFeaturePage]] #else See [[$equivXWikiFeaturePage||anchor="$equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor"]] #end #elseif ("$!equivXWikiFeatureURL" != "" && $equivXWikiFeatureURL != "?") See $equivXWikiFeatureURL #end #end #set ($handlingDetails = $macroObj.getValue("handlingDetails")) #if ("$!handlingDetails" != "") == Import details $handlingDetails #end #end #end {{/velocity}}
